title: Import Large SQL Files with MySQL CLI (No Timeouts)
description: Browser imports fail? The MySQL CLI is faster and more reliable for big dumps.
author: SQLSplit

content.text: The CLI bypasses phpMyAdmin limits and runs directly on the server.
Split the dump first so each import completes quickly. Related: **How to Import Large SQL Files in cPanel**.

content.title: Prep for CLI import
content.text: Split your dump into predictable chunks.

faq.question: Do I need SSH access?
faq.answer: Yes. CLI import runs on the server.
